successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveRequest, LeaveRequestStatus, LeaveType, CreateLeaveRequestDTO, and UpdateLeaveRequestStatusDTO matching the specified interfaces.
src/modules/audit/audit.model.ts exists and exports the AuditRecord interface with the specified fields.
src/modules/audit/audit.repository.ts exports AuditRecordRepository and PostgreSqlAuditRecordRepository implementing PostgreSQL-backed audit record persistence through a pg Pool.
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exports LeaveRequestRepository and PostgreSqlLeaveRequestRepository with create, findById, updateStatus, and delete methods using PostgreSQL-backed persistence.
All state-changing LeaveRequest repository operations (create, updateStatus, delete) write audit records via AuditRecordRepository.
tests/unit/modules/leave/leave.repository.test.ts exists and verifies create, read, updateStatus, and delete repository behavior using Vitest.

constraints: Repository pattern: all database access must go through repository interfaces.
Audit records: all state-changing operations must write an audit record.
Use the specified PostgreSQL-backed repository implementations and pg Pool dependency.
Keep scope limited to LeaveRequest and AuditRecord models, repositories, and the repository unit test.
Implement repository contracts and persistence boundaries before workflow logic.
No unhandled promise rejections; all async errors must be caught and handled.
Do not introduce reverse dependencies that violate the module dependency rules.
Input validation, API endpoints, and RBAC enforcement are not to be implemented in this phase because no API surface is being added.
outOfScope: Leave request workflow logic such as submit, approve, reject, or cancel operations beyond repository persistence methods.
Notification domain models, repositories, or workflow integration.
LeaveBalance domain models, repositories, or balance deduction behavior.
LeavePolicy domain models, repositories, or rule evaluation.
Employee integration beyond storing employeeId on LeaveRequest.
API endpoints, Fastify routes, controllers, request validation, and RBAC implementation.
Database migrations or schema changes beyond using the provided schema contract.
Phase 2 through Phase 7 functionality explicitly deferred in the intent.

ambiguities.description: The intent says to create approximately 4-5 files, but the detailed architecture explicitly lists five files including the unit test.
options: Create exactly the five listed files.
Treat 4-5 as flexible and create only four implementation files without the test.

ambiguities.description: AuditRecordRepository defines only a create method, but the expected persistence behavior and error-handling details are not specified.
options: Implement only the create operation required by the interface.
Add additional audit repository methods beyond create.
